properties.name: graceSec
properties.description: Grace window in seconds after `exp`. Defaults to 14 days.

properties.name: isNoncommercial
properties.description: If true, missing token resolves to `noncommercial` instead of `missing`.

properties.name: nowSec
properties.description: Current time in epoch seconds. Injected for testability.

properties.name: claims
properties.description: Populated when the token was valid (licensed / grace / expired).

name: LicenseClaims
description: Claims carried inside a signed license token.

properties.name: isNoncommercial
properties.description: Hint that the environment is noncommercial (e.g. NODE_ENV !== 'production').

properties.name: nowSec
properties.description: Current time in epoch seconds. Defaults to now. Injected for testability.

properties.name: publicKey
properties.description: Ed25519 public key to verify against.

properties.name: warn
properties.description: Injected warn channel, defaults to console.warn.

name: LICENSE_PUBLIC_KEY
description: Ed25519 public key baked into this build of `@threadplane/licensing`.

name: emitNag
description:
Emit one non-blocking license warning for a package/status pair.

`licensed` and `noncommercial` statuses are silent. Other statuses warn once
per package and status so repeated initialization does not spam logs.

name: evaluateLicense
description:
Convert a verified token result into a license status.

`verifyResult` may be undefined when no token was supplied. In that case a
caller-provided `isNoncommercial` hint returns `noncommercial`; otherwise the
status is `missing`. Signature failures return `tampered`, and valid claims
are evaluated against `exp` plus the optional grace window.
signature: evaluateLicense(verifyResult: VerifyResult | undefined, options: EvaluateOptions): EvaluateResult

name: inferNoncommercial
description:
Heuristic default for the `isNoncommercial` flag in `runLicenseCheck`.

Returns `true` when `process.env.NODE_ENV` is anything other than
`"production"` — treating dev/test/CI builds as noncommercial so the
license nag stays quiet. Returns `false` when there is no `process`
global (browser-like environments without a dev shim), which is the
safe default for production bundles.

Callers can always override via the `isNoncommercial` option on
`runLicenseCheck`; this is only the fallback.

name: runLicenseCheck
description:
Run the full package license check.

The helper verifies an optional token, evaluates the status, emits the
package nag warning when appropriate, and memoizes identical package/token
pairs so repeated provider initialization stays quiet.

name: signLicense
description:
Sign license claims with an Ed25519 private key.
Returns a compact token of the form `<base64url(payload-json)>.<base64url(signature)>`,
compatible with parseLicenseToken and verifyLicense.

name: verifyLicense
description:
Offline-verify a license token against a raw Ed25519 public key.
No network calls, no time-based checks — see evaluateLicense
for grace-period / expiry logic.
